violations.text: The chest freezer was not in good repair, with the gasket detaching from the lid. PIC showed receipt for new chest freezer order. New Violation. Correct By: 03/15/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the sink, table beneath grill, and shelves including the underside, have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/15/2024
